Class ConfigurationTransformer

java.lang.Object
de.ukbonn.mwtek.dashboard.misc.ConfigurationTransformer
public class ConfigurationTransformer extends Object
Class that reads individually configurable terminology codes from YAML and converts them into required formats and data types for data queries and data processing.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    ConfigurationTransformer.ConfigurationContext
    Some parts of the local configuration require individual handling in the reading and evaluation process.

  • Method Details

    • extractInputCodes

      public static List<String> extractInputCodes(CustomGlobalConfiguration customGlobalConfiguration, ConfigurationTransformer.ConfigurationContext context)

    • extractQualitativeLabCodesSettings

    • extractKidsRadarCodes

      public static Map<String, List<String>> extractKidsRadarCodes(CustomGlobalConfiguration customGlobalConfiguration, KidsRadarDataItemContext kidsRadarDataItemContext, String codeKey)
      Extracts codes (e.g., ICD or LOINC) dynamically from the global configuration for the given Kids Radar context.

      If the context object contains a nested map under codeKey, that nested map will be used (e.g., for PED*). Otherwise, the top-level context map will be used (e.g., for KJP). In addition, top-level overrides from inputCodes with the same key are still applied.

      Parameters:
      customGlobalConfiguration - the global configuration containing input codes
      kidsRadarDataItemContext - the target context (KJP or PED)
      codeKey - the code key inside the context map (e.g., "icd" or "loinc")
      Returns:
      a map assigning diagnosis group keys to lists of codes
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null

    • extractKidsRadarDiagnosisConditions

      public static Map<String, List<String>> extractKidsRadarDiagnosisConditions(CustomGlobalConfiguration customGlobalConfiguration, KidsRadarDataItemContext kidsRadarDataItemContext)
      Extracts ICD codes for kiradar. Internally delegates to extractKidsRadarCodes(CustomGlobalConfiguration, KidsRadarDataItemContext, String) with codeKey="icd".

    • extractKidsRadarLoincCodes

      public static Map<String, List<String>> extractKidsRadarLoincCodes(CustomGlobalConfiguration customGlobalConfiguration, KidsRadarDataItemContext kidsRadarDataItemContext)
      Extracts LOINC codes for kiradar. Internally delegates to extractKidsRadarCodes(CustomGlobalConfiguration, KidsRadarDataItemContext, String) with codeKey="loinc".

    • getListAsString

      public static String getListAsString(Collection<?> idList)
